 1 package main                                                                                                         
 2                                                                                                                      
 3 import (                                                                                                             
 4     "fmt"                                                                                                            
 5 )                                                                                                                    
 6                                                                                                                      
 7 type GapBuffer struct {                                                                                              
 8     data []rune                                                                                                      
 9     gap  int                                                                                                         
10     size int                                                                                                         
11 }                                                                                                                    
12                                                                                                                      
13 func NewGapBuffer(initialSize int) *GapBuffer {                                                                      
14     gb := &GapBuffer{                                                                                                
15         data: make([]rune, initialSize),                                                                             
16         gap:  initialSize,                                                                                           
17         size: 0,                                                                                                     
18     }                                                                                                                
19     return gb                                                                                                        
20 }                                                                                                                    
21                                                                                                                      
22 func (gb *GapBuffer) MoveGap(position int) {                                                                         
23     if position < 0 || position > gb.size {                                                                          
24         return                                                                                                       
25     }                                                                                                                
26     if position < gb.gap {                                                                                           
27         for i := position; i < gb.gap; i++ {                                                                         
28             gb.data[i], gb.data[i+gb.gap-position] = gb.data[i+gb.gap-position], gb.data[i]                          
29         }                                                                                                            
30     } else {                                                                                                         
31         for i := gb.gap; i < position; i++ {                                                                         
32             gb.data[i-gb.gap+position] = gb.data[i]                                                                  
33         }                                                                                                            
34     }                                                                                                                
35     gb.gap = position                                                                                                
36 }                                                                                                                    
37                                                                                                                      
38 func (gb *GapBuffer) Delete(start, end int) {                                                                        
█NORMAL██0003.txt██ master█                                                                             █36:0█
